source: WMATA GTFS pathways topology (conservative single-platform Street→Mezzanine→Platform ladders)

models.note: One elevator connects the street to the platform. It has no backup — if it is out of service, the station has no step-free route.
models.internalNote: Topology from WMATA GTFS pathways (mode-5 elevator components): Street→Platform: 1 elevator. In-station elevators only — garage/facility elevators are not in the rail GTFS. Slot ids are real WMATA UnitNames (from live observation or the Rider-Tools page inventory), synthetic WMATA-<node> only where neither has one yet.
